info.title: DocsMint API
info.description: Self-hosted AI-native knowledge base API. Supports browser sessions, global and category-scoped bearer keys, CLI/MCP clients, document pipelines, sharing, and storage workflows.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Category CRUD and category API-access policy

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Browser-session-only key issuance, listing, reveal, and revocation

tags.name: Pipeline
tags.description: Document embedding and GraphRAG pipeline status

post.description: Returns the raw global key once. Requires a real browser session.

post.summary: Create a key scoped to one category
post.description: The category must first be saved with apiMode=category and at least one permission. The recoverable category secret is encrypted at rest.

get.summary: List the current user API keys

get.description: Global keys are not recoverable. Response is no-store.

get.summary: Get embedding and GraphRAG pipeline progress

post.summary: Create a direct storage PUT URL

post.description: Call after PUT succeeds. Verifies object existence and records the attachment.

get.summary: Proxy an external image referenced by an authorized document

key.description: Raw key returned at creation time.

BearerAuth.description: Global or category-scoped DocsMint API key. The operator key is also accepted as a bearer token on operator-capable routes.

SessionAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
SessionAuth.description: Better Auth browser session. Secure deployments may use the __Secure- prefixed cookie name.
